creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your report Ralf

A follow-up comment in the upstream issue indicates that this was reproducible in 0.2.0 as well.

Perhaps this is a symptom of a particular environment, rather than the port or the upstream code?

Can you include the output of pkg version -v as an attachment please.

Also, if you haven't tried yet, please rebuild openssl and py-openssl
